description: Golden retrieval set over the pnpm seed:demo workspace. Each item names the room and a stable substring of the message (or pdf chunk) that answers the question; the eval runner resolves anchors to live ids at run time.

items.question: What did we decide about the launch date?

expect.contains: moving the launch from Tuesday to Thursday

items.question: Why was the launch moved to Thursday?

expect.contains: land together instead of dribbling out

items.question: What is the team plan pricing?
Is billing annual or monthly at launch?
Who owns the pricing page copy?

expect.contains: Mira owns the pricing page copy

items.question: Who is responsible for the changelog?
When is the deadline for the launch workstreams?

expect.contains: Deadline for all three: Wednesday noon

items.question: What has to finish before pricing goes live?
How long does the rollback take?
How many changelog entries are there?
What is the status of the demo video?
What is the launch success metric?
What is the guardrail on embedding costs?
What date does the launch plan pdf give?
Which theme ships as the default?
Why does paper work better as the default?
What are the empty state guidelines?

expect.contains: short headline, one sentence of direction

items.question: What was wrong with the empty state headline?
How is reduced motion handled?
How was the unread chip contrast fixed?
What was the design crit about?
Where did the suggested questions idea come from?
What caused the checkout outage?
How long was checkout down?
What was the contributing factor to the retry storm?
How many checkouts failed during the incident?
What did the postmortem decide?

expect.contains: every external service call gets a circuit breaker

items.question: Who owns the circuit breaker rollout?
How far along is the breaker rollout?
Were there any double charges during the outage?
